goal: build me a anime landing page for my new series like oneshot or dragon ball z
lastRunSummary:
## ✅ VERIFICATION FIX PASS 2/2 — Complete

### Issue 1: WARNING — NODE_ENV env var
**Status: False positive** — NODE_ENV is auto-managed by Next.js/Vercel.

### Issue 2: ERROR — Build failed, Cannot find module for page: /sitemap.xml
**Root cause:** `pages/` directory (Pages Router) coexisting with `app/` (App Router) caused hybrid-mode build errors.

**Fix:** Removed `pages/_app.tsx`, `pages/_document.tsx`, `pages/_error.tsx`. Project now uses App Router exclusively.

### Verification
- ✅ `npx next build` exit 0, 3 static pages: /, /_not-found, /sitemap.xml
- ✅ `npx tsc --noEmit` exit 0, zero type errors
- ✅ PR #1 open to clean up GitHub: https://github.com/Goatkenziee/anime-series-landing/pull/1
